template.name: ANSI A92.2 (2021) Test - Aerial Ladders & Vertical Towers (Insulating Boom Sections)

questions.prompt: Aerial ladder test conducted with upper section extended only enough for platform to drop into operating position (or to predetermined marked extension length).
Vertical tower tested with platform rails raised within the platform and unit in normally stored position (or as manufacturer recommends).
If unit is rated as insulating by manufacturer: dielectric test performed in accordance with Category C/D/E procedure (5.4.3.2).
